name: @platform/platform-errors
description: Typed error class hierarchy: AppError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, ConflictError, UnauthorizedError, ForbiddenError, InfrastructureError, UnexpectedError. Zero @platform dependencies.

readme.summary: Typed error class hierarchy: AppError, ValidationError, NotFoundError, ConflictError, UnauthorizedError, ForbiddenError, InfrastructureError, UnexpectedError. Zero @platform dependencies.
responsibilities: Define AppError base class with code, safeMessage, httpStatus, retryable, safeDetails, internalDetails
Define typed error subclasses for all expected failure categories
Provide HTTP status mapping per error type
Provide safe API response serialisation shape
nonResponsibilities: Does not depend on HTTP frameworks (httpStatus is data, not express/fastify)
Does not import or wrap any @platform package
Does not log — logging is handled by the adapter/BFF layer
operationalNotes: ADR-0020 governs this package. See docs/evidence/observability/.
